nasb.text: As for the sons of Israel’s half, which Moses separated from the men who had gone to war—

esv.text: From the people of Israel’s half, which Moses separated from that of the men who had served in the army—

cnv.text: 以色列人所得的那一半，就是摩西從打仗的人取來分給他們的；

ccb.text: 以色列会众分得的那一半战利品，即摩西从出征之人的战利品中分出来给他们的，
